task_completion.description: Open and read the target list of Arp interacting galaxies.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a text editor, terminal (e.g., using 'cat'), or file viewer displaying the contents of '~/Documents/arp_merger_targets.txt' showing the targets (arp244, arp273, arp242, arp81).

task_completion.description: Configure the camera settings for the required FITS exposures.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the astronomy software's capture module (e.g., Ekos Capture tab) showing the filter set to 'Luminance' (or Slot 1), the exposure time set to 120 seconds, and the capture count set to at least 3.

task_completion.description: Capture the FITS exposures for the targets and save them to the designated directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the capture sequence running/completed in the GUI, or a file manager/terminal showing the generated .fits files saved in the '/home/ga/Images/arp_survey/' directory.

task_completion.description: Capture sky view morphology images with the specified FOV and palette.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a sky map interface (e.g., KStars) centered on the target galaxies, displaying a 0.5-degree Field of View (FOV) and using a 'vibrant' color palette.

task_completion.description: Compile the survey results into a JSON observation log.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a text editor or IDE displaying a properly formatted JSON file named 'arp_survey_log.json' in '~/Documents/', containing observation entries for the four Arp targets.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually used the astronomy software GUI to perform the survey.
integrity.visual_evidence: Check for screenshots showing active interaction with KStars/Ekos (slewing to targets, starting captures) rather than just mocking the final JSON log file.

integrity.description: Verify that image files were genuinely created.
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that the FITS and morphology image files physically exist in the file manager or terminal listings, proving the agent didn't just skip the capture steps.

integrity.description: Verify the JSON log was created dynamically based on the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that the agent typed or constructed the JSON log in an editor, rather than using a single command to echo a pre-computed, hardcoded string of the entire final file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Targets: arp244, arp273, arp242, arp81. FITS requirements: Luminance filter (slot 1), 120 seconds exposure, minimum 3 exposures per target. Morphology requirements: 0.5 degrees FOV, vibrant palette. Directories: FITS saved to /home/ga/Images/arp_survey/, log saved to /home/ga/Documents/arp_survey_log.json, targets read from /home/ga/Documents/arp_merger_targets.txt.
